title: Blockchain Verification
metaDescription: Verify the authenticity of a GreenEcoGenius traceability certificate.
searchPlaceholder: Enter a hash or certificate number (e.g. GEG-2026-...)
searchSubtext: Scan the QR code on your certificate or paste the hash above.
howStep1: Each transaction is recorded in a tamper-proof blockchain.
howStep2: A unique SHA-256 cryptographic hash is generated for each batch.
howStep3: This page verifies the authenticity and data integrity at any time.
verifiedDesc: This certificate is recorded on the GreenEcoGenius blockchain and its data integrity is confirmed.
notFoundDesc: The hash or certificate number does not match any record.
notFoundCheck: Make sure you copied the complete hash without spaces.
contact: If you believe this is an error, contact us:
